title: verbascum × obtusifoliiforme
intro: Verbascum × obtusifoliiforme, also known as the hybrid mullein, is a plant species that belongs to the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae) and is a cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum blattaria. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × obtusifoliiforme include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. This plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
